title: Gresorth 1 Pcs Artificial Purple Garlic String Fake Vegetable Hanging Decoration Realistic Onion Display Ceramics Pendant Model for Dining Room Home
features: Fake Vegetable Model: You will receive a string of artificial purple ceramic hanging garlic skewers decoration, approximately 15.94 inches/40.5cm long, each containing 10 fake garlic, with a diameter of approximately 1.89 inches/4.8cm per onion.

Artificial Garlic String: Each lifelike ceramics garlic on the fake onion hanging pendant decoration is carefully molded to replicate the natural texture and shape of real garlic vegetable, and comes with a woven rope that can be left for a long time. It can be cleaned directly with a cloth for easy cleaning.

Realistic Ceramics String: Artificial garlic vegetable pendant display ornament can be stored for a long time without changing color or deformation, making it a good choice for kitchen decoration. You can decorate a lifelike onion string model in a vegetable basket, or hang it in an exhibition room, haunted house, or bar.

Lifelike Hanging Onion: Simulation hanging garlic skewer model is made of ceramic, with bright colors, lifelike appearance, and rich texture. However, it should be handled with care as severe collisions may cause the ceramic onion decoration to break. Artificial faux onion string is perfect for home, restaurant, or photography prop, bringing both realistic beauty and adding a real rural atmosphere.

Multi Functional Use: Whether you decorate your home, kitchen, windowsill, balcony, living room, bedroom, bathroom, office, farmhouse, party, wedding, restaurant, storefront, or supermarket with fake garlic string, it can become a unique scenic spot. Using our artificial ceramics vegetable ornaments on special occasions such as birthdays, anniversaries, Christmas, Thanksgiving, Halloween, New Year, etc., brings a warm atmosphere to your space.
